tickets.title: How do I resend the onboarding email?
tickets.raw_content: We need a quick answer for the customer success team. The onboarding email was lost in spam and we need the resend flow documented.

tickets.title: The report filter label is confusing
tickets.raw_content: The dashboard filter says Region but it actually filters by office. Users keep missing the report they want because the label is unclear.

tickets.title: Checkout fails when I click Pay
tickets.raw_content: The payment flow throws a 500 error and the order never completes. This blocks customers from finishing the purchase.

tickets.title: Bid sync is delayed after integration
tickets.raw_content: Our bidding partner is connected, but the integration lags by 30 minutes and the synced values arrive too late for the campaign.
